text:
Most people are only trying to get discovered inside Instagram.

They’re completely ignoring this.

Because of a recent Instagram + Google integration, your posts can now show up in Google search results…

…but only if you turn this setting on.

It takes 10 seconds and it means your content isn’t just competing on Instagram anymore—it can live outside the app too.

That’s a completely different level of reach.
The key after that?

👉 Use clear keywords so your content actually gets found

This is one of those small changes that most people skip… but it compounds over time.

If you want the full system for getting discovered in 2026:
👇 Comment “discover” and I’ll send you my full guide

#instagramgrowth #contentcreator #socialmediatips #instagramtips #creatortips

You should now be able to set your custom algorithm for all content types, not just Reels!

Previously this could be found on the Reels feed and would only effect which Reels you see. Now you can access it from Explore and set your custom algorithm for ALL content types.

Give it a try and share the news!

#instagramupdate #newinstagram #instagramfeature #instagramfeatures

Sometimes the hardest part of using AI isn’t the tools…

…it’s knowing where to start.

That’s why I’ve been using Workflow Quick Guides in @adobefirefly Boards.

Instead of guessing your way through prompts, you can:
-Follow step-by-step workflows
-See exactly how things are built
-And then tweak them to make them your own

In this post I tried 3 of my favourite ones: virtual try on, apply logo, and brand imagery.

All of these took seconds to create and way less trial and error than doing it from scratch.

If you’ve been curious about using AI for content, design, or ideas… this is one of the easiest ways to get started.

👉 Try it yourself: firefly.adobe.com/boards

Scroll down to “Discover Workflows for Boards” and pick one to test.

Let me know which one you’d like to use 👇

#AdobeFireflyAmbassadors #Ad #FireflyBoards #AItools #contentcreation

Most people hit “post”… and then do nothing.
That’s the mistake.

What you do right after posting is what actually gives your content a chance.

If you just post and disappear: – no conversations – no signals to the algorithm – no reason for your content to spread

But if you spend even 20–30 minutes engaging intentionally, it changes everything.
Reply to comments. Start conversations. Engage with people who are active right now.
That’s what tells Instagram your content matters.
Go through this and actually try it on your next post.

Which step do you skip the most?
👇 let me know below

#instagramgrowth #contentcreator #socialmediatips #instagramtips #creatortips

In all seriousness I think Justin Bieber’s Coachella set was pretty awesome🇨🇦

#contentcreators #contentideas #smallbusinessmemes

Sometimes the hardest part of content creation isn’t starting from scratch…

…it’s trying to make something you already have actually work.

That’s exactly what I did here.
I took a photo I haven’t used in a while and added a few quick Express Fix tools in @AdobeExpress to turn it into something I’d actually post.

With tools like Remove Object and Remove Background I can clear up the graphics and make sure it’s all ready for my carousels, Reel covers, and more.

Nothing complicated. Just small fixes that make a big difference.

If you’re creating content consistently, this is the kind of workflow that saves you time and makes your posts look way more intentional.

Give Adobe Express a try and let me know how you use it for an #ExpressFix!

#AdobeExpressAmbassadors #Ad #contentcreation

The feature we’ve all been waiting for!
Did you know Instagram dropped this feature? Try it out and see if you can edit your comments. Theres only a 15 minute window where you can do it.

#instagramupdate #newinstagram

Most creators think their content stopped working.
It didn’t.
Instagram changed.

The problem is… most people are still posting like it’s 2020.

They’re: – chasing likes instead of shares – posting randomly instead of building recognizable formats – focusing on followers instead of content quality

And because of that, their content never really gets a chance.
The biggest shift right now is simple:

👉 Good content gets seen 👉 Not big accounts

Once you understand that, everything changes.

Go through the slides and figure out which one you need to adjust first.

Then fix that one thing.

That’s how you start seeing results again.

Which change surprised you the most?

#instagramgrowth #contentcreator #socialmediatips #instagramtips #contentstrategy

My go to tool for generating AI images is @adobefirefly and it’s thanks to all the different AI Partner models it brings together in one place.

Lately I’ve been using Gemini 3.1 with Nano Banana 2 for most of my images because of its speed and the character consistency it can maintain when developing image after image.

I want these photos to consistently look like me and by easily adding a set of reference images of my likeness I can make sure that’s what I get when I press generate.

Try it out for yourself by going to firefly.adobe.com/generate/image

#AdobeFireflyAmbassadors #Ad #AdobePartnerModels #aitools

I try and do a little Instagram spring cleaning at this time of year each time it comes around…and this year I need it more than ever!

That’s actually why the final point in this carousel that’s about consistency is the most important part. I’ve been doing this for 6 years now and have seen so many ups and downs. Times where it’s easy to grow and times where I feel like giving up.

But instead of giving up I’ve reminded myself to take a breath, see what I can change or refresh, and where possible, built a new system to maintain my consistency, find content topics that excite me again, and carry on.

That’s what this post is all about and if you want a quick little guide for how to clean up your account with these steps just comment “cleanup”.

#contentcreator #contentideas #contentcreatortips

There’s a gap forming between creators right now.
Not talent.
Not effort.
Access.

Some creators are reacting to trends after they’ve already peaked. Some are keeping up with new tools and workflows. And a small group is learning what’s coming before it hits.

That difference usually comes down to one thing: who you’re learning from.

That’s why spaces like the @Adobe 99U Conference matter.

It’s a one-day event on June 4 in NYC (with a FREE virtual option) bringing together voices from the Adobe Creative Collective: creatives, founders, and technologists actively shaping how creative work is evolving.

Not recycled advice.
Not surface-level trends.
Actual insight into workflows, tools, and how to stay competitive as things change.

If you care about growing as a creator, this is the kind of room you want to be in.

Register now to explore the future of creative work:

adobe.ly/40YALDf

#AdobeAmbassadors #Ad #AdobeCreativeCollective #99u

I planned these content ideas to be ones you can actually try and apply to your niche. They aren’t generic and they build into a narrative that will help you connect with your audience in just one month!

If you want them all in a handy free guide just comment April2026 on this post.

#contentideas #contentcreator
